organization.name: MJW Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 8465 Keystone Crossing, Indianapolis, Indiana 46240, US
organization.short_description:
Our Story:

Now known as MJW Mortgage, MJW Financial LLC first opened its doors in early 2008 in spite of the unfavorable housing market conditions. Unhappy with the reputation given to mortgage banks subsequent to the fall of numerous lenders, the founder decided to create a company whose sole purpose would be to provide affordable and appropriate mortgages to both homeowners with the desire to refinance, and home buyers wishing to purchase. Customer service and the willingness to exhaust every available resource are the two main principles that drive the MJW team.

MJW's ultimate goal is to understand your immediate needs, as well as your plans for the future, and introduce you to a loan that will satisfy both. Fulfilling this goal with every customer has resulted in MJW growing every year since it's inception.

Our Values

The founders of MJW Mortgage pride themselves on the delivery of an unmatched mortgage experience.

Doing the Right Thing: When shopping for a home there can be multiple options for any client. We believe outstanding mortgage service starts with advising clients on the best possible options and scenarios for their personal budget and needs. We tailor the mortgage to best fit the client's situation, and not to maximize profits.

Delivering on the Promise: At MJW Mortgage we make a promise to each customer to provide excellent service by communicating often and openly, and executing tasks quickly, in order to complete the loan process with ease. We proudly deliver on-time closings for our clients and realtor referral partners.

Focus on People: Our mission since opening has been to help clients understand the mortgage process. Buying a home is a big investment, and we want every client to feel informed and secure in their decision. Our team aims to create trust with every client, by ensuring availability and communication throughout the home buying process.

organization.short_description:
Our Story:

Now known as MJW Mortgage, MJW Financial LLC first opened its doors in early 2008 in spite of the unfavorable housing market conditions. Unhappy with the reputation given to mortgage banks subsequent to the fall of numerous lenders, the founder decided to create a company whose sole purpose would be to provide affordable and appropriate mortgages to both homeowners with the desire to refinance, and home buyers wishing to purchase. Customer service and the willingness to exhaust every available resource are the two main principles that drive the MJW team.

MJW's ultimate goal is to understand your immediate needs, as well as your plans for the future, and introduce you to a loan that will satisfy both. Fulfilling this goal with every customer has resulted in MJW growing every year since it's inception.

Our Values

The founders of MJW Mortgage pride themselves on the delivery of an unmatched mortgage experience.

Doing the Right Thing: When shopping for a home there can be multiple options for any client. We believe outstanding mortgage service starts with advising clients on the best possible options and scenarios for their personal budget and needs. We tailor the mortgage to best fit the client's situation, and not to maximize profits.

Delivering on the Promise: At MJW Mortgage we make a promise to each customer to provide excellent service by communicating often and openly, and executing tasks quickly, in order to complete the loan process with ease. We proudly deliver on-time closings for our clients and realtor referral partners.

Focus on People: Our mission since opening has been to help clients understand the mortgage process. Buying a home is a big investment, and we want every client to feel informed and secure in their decision. Our team aims to create trust with every client, by ensuring availability and communication throughout the home buying process.

https://mjwmortgage.com/equal-housing-opportunity/

organization.short_description:
Corridor Funding is a Texas-based private money lender established in 2016 by Jasen Miller and Jason Hirko. The company specializes in hard money loans for real estate investors, LLCs, and corporations, providing an alternative to traditional banking options. Headquartered in Spring Branch, Texas, Corridor Funding serves clients across several states, including Texas, Missouri, and Florida, and emphasizes fast closings, flexible terms, and personalized service.

The company offers a variety of loan products tailored for real estate needs, including bridge loans, fix and flip loans, new construction financing, long-term rental loans, and commercial loans. Key features include interest-only options, no prepayment penalties, and quick approval processes, with some loans closing in as little as one week. Corridor Funding is committed to supporting its clients with efficient underwriting and transparent pricing, fostering long-term relationships with a high rate of repeat business.

organization.short_description:
The Indianapolis Neighborhood Housing Partnership (INHP) is a nonprofit organization founded in 1988, dedicated to enhancing homeownership opportunities in Marion County. As a Certified Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI), INHP focuses on creating affordable housing solutions for low- and moderate-income families. The organization aims to improve the quality of life in Indianapolis neighborhoods through various initiatives.

INHP provides a wide range of services, including homebuyer education and counseling, affordable mortgage and financing options, down payment assistance, and home repair loans. They also support community development through technical resources and equitable transit-oriented development financing. By collaborating with local, state, and federal agencies, as well as community organizations and financial institutions, INHP works to empower individuals and families to achieve and maintain homeownership. Over its 25+ years of operation, INHP has positively impacted thousands of families in the region.

organization.name: MJW Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 8465 Keystone Crossing, Indianapolis, Indiana 46240, US
organization.short_description:
Our Story:

Now known as MJW Mortgage, MJW Financial LLC first opened its doors in early 2008 in spite of the unfavorable housing market conditions. Unhappy with the reputation given to mortgage banks subsequent to the fall of numerous lenders, the founder decided to create a company whose sole purpose would be to provide affordable and appropriate mortgages to both homeowners with the desire to refinance, and home buyers wishing to purchase. Customer service and the willingness to exhaust every available resource are the two main principles that drive the MJW team.

MJW's ultimate goal is to understand your immediate needs, as well as your plans for the future, and introduce you to a loan that will satisfy both. Fulfilling this goal with every customer has resulted in MJW growing every year since it's inception.

Our Values

The founders of MJW Mortgage pride themselves on the delivery of an unmatched mortgage experience.

Doing the Right Thing: When shopping for a home there can be multiple options for any client. We believe outstanding mortgage service starts with advising clients on the best possible options and scenarios for their personal budget and needs. We tailor the mortgage to best fit the client's situation, and not to maximize profits.

Delivering on the Promise: At MJW Mortgage we make a promise to each customer to provide excellent service by communicating often and openly, and executing tasks quickly, in order to complete the loan process with ease. We proudly deliver on-time closings for our clients and realtor referral partners.

Focus on People: Our mission since opening has been to help clients understand the mortgage process. Buying a home is a big investment, and we want every client to feel informed and secure in their decision. Our team aims to create trust with every client, by ensuring availability and communication throughout the home buying process.

https://mjwmortgage.com/equal-housing-opportunity/

Originally founded as First National Bank in 1873, it became Horizon Bank in 1997 and operates as Horizon Bancorp, Inc. The bank has a strong presence with branches in 39 counties across the Midwest and boasts total assets of $5 billion, making it the largest bank in Indiana.

Horizon Bank provides a wide array of financial services, including commercial and retail banking, mortgage banking, private wealth management, and investment services. It also offers online and digital banking options, such as mobile deposit and video banking, along with bilingual services at select locations. The bank is known for its innovative banking solutions, having introduced several firsts in Indiana, including the first drive-up window and ATM. Horizon Bank focuses on building long-term relationships with its diverse customer base, which includes local businesses, individual consumers, and students.

Now known as MJW Mortgage, MJW Financial LLC first opened its doors in early 2008 in spite of the unfavorable housing market conditions. Unhappy with the reputation given to mortgage banks subsequent to the fall of numerous lenders, the founder decided to create a company whose sole purpose would be to provide affordable and appropriate mortgages to both homeowners with the desire to refinance, and home buyers wishing to purchase. Customer service and the willingness to exhaust every available resource are the two main principles that drive the MJW team.

MJW's ultimate goal is to understand your immediate needs, as well as your plans for the future, and introduce you to a loan that will satisfy both. Fulfilling this goal with every customer has resulted in MJW growing every year since it's inception.

Our Values

The founders of MJW Mortgage pride themselves on the delivery of an unmatched mortgage experience.

Doing the Right Thing: When shopping for a home there can be multiple options for any client. We believe outstanding mortgage service starts with advising clients on the best possible options and scenarios for their personal budget and needs. We tailor the mortgage to best fit the client's situation, and not to maximize profits.

Delivering on the Promise: At MJW Mortgage we make a promise to each customer to provide excellent service by communicating often and openly, and executing tasks quickly, in order to complete the loan process with ease. We proudly deliver on-time closings for our clients and realtor referral partners.

Focus on People: Our mission since opening has been to help clients understand the mortgage process. Buying a home is a big investment, and we want every client to feel informed and secure in their decision. Our team aims to create trust with every client, by ensuring availability and communication throughout the home buying process.

organization.short_description:
Our Story:

Now known as MJW Mortgage, MJW Financial LLC first opened its doors in early 2008 in spite of the unfavorable housing market conditions. Unhappy with the reputation given to mortgage banks subsequent to the fall of numerous lenders, the founder decided to create a company whose sole purpose would be to provide affordable and appropriate mortgages to both homeowners with the desire to refinance, and home buyers wishing to purchase. Customer service and the willingness to exhaust every available resource are the two main principles that drive the MJW team.

MJW's ultimate goal is to understand your immediate needs, as well as your plans for the future, and introduce you to a loan that will satisfy both. Fulfilling this goal with every customer has resulted in MJW growing every year since it's inception.

Our Values

The founders of MJW Mortgage pride themselves on the delivery of an unmatched mortgage experience.

Doing the Right Thing: When shopping for a home there can be multiple options for any client. We believe outstanding mortgage service starts with advising clients on the best possible options and scenarios for their personal budget and needs. We tailor the mortgage to best fit the client's situation, and not to maximize profits.

Delivering on the Promise: At MJW Mortgage we make a promise to each customer to provide excellent service by communicating often and openly, and executing tasks quickly, in order to complete the loan process with ease. We proudly deliver on-time closings for our clients and realtor referral partners.

Focus on People: Our mission since opening has been to help clients understand the mortgage process. Buying a home is a big investment, and we want every client to feel informed and secure in their decision. Our team aims to create trust with every client, by ensuring availability and communication throughout the home buying process.

organization.short_description:
Everwise Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned community credit union based in South Bend, Indiana. With over 90 years of history, it is the largest credit union in the state, operating 50 branch locations across Indiana and serving members in four neighboring counties in Michigan. Originally founded in 1931 as Teachers Credit Union, it rebranded to Everwise Credit Union in 2025 to reflect its diverse membership and commitment to financial growth and accessibility.

Everwise offers a variety of consumer-focused financial products and services, including loans for auto, RV, boat, home equity, and commercial lending. The credit union provides digital features like mobile notary services and access to over 700 no-fee ATMs in Indiana and Michigan. It emphasizes member-first operations, focusing on personal attention and community impact, and aims to help members achieve financial wellbeing through tailored guidance and better rates. Membership is open to anyone living or working in eligible counties in Indiana and Michigan, as well as their immediate family members.

Our Story:

Now known as MJW Mortgage, MJW Financial LLC first opened its doors in early 2008 in spite of the unfavorable housing market conditions. Unhappy with the reputation given to mortgage banks subsequent to the fall of numerous lenders, the founder decided to create a company whose sole purpose would be to provide affordable and appropriate mortgages to both homeowners with the desire to refinance, and home buyers wishing to purchase. Customer service and the willingness to exhaust every available resource are the two main principles that drive the MJW team.

MJW's ultimate goal is to understand your immediate needs, as well as your plans for the future, and introduce you to a loan that will satisfy both. Fulfilling this goal with every customer has resulted in MJW growing every year since it's inception.

Our Values

The founders of MJW Mortgage pride themselves on the delivery of an unmatched mortgage experience.

Doing the Right Thing: When shopping for a home there can be multiple options for any client. We believe outstanding mortgage service starts with advising clients on the best possible options and scenarios for their personal budget and needs. We tailor the mortgage to best fit the client's situation, and not to maximize profits.

Delivering on the Promise: At MJW Mortgage we make a promise to each customer to provide excellent service by communicating often and openly, and executing tasks quickly, in order to complete the loan process with ease. We proudly deliver on-time closings for our clients and realtor referral partners.

Focus on People: Our mission since opening has been to help clients understand the mortgage process. Buying a home is a big investment, and we want every client to feel informed and secure in their decision. Our team aims to create trust with every client, by ensuring availability and communication throughout the home buying process.

In 2023, AMSC became a subsidiary of Thrive Mortgage, enhancing its retail operations and expanding its offerings.

Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation is a nationwide mortgage lender founded in 1996 and headquartered in Madison, Wisconsin, and Carrollton, Texas. The company operates in all 50 states, focusing on purchase mortgages to help Americans achieve homeownership. Fairway has experienced significant growth, funding over $65.8 billion in loans by 2020 and employing between 3,600 and over 10,000 team members across more than 345 branches.

Fairway offers a variety of mortgage loan products with competitive rates and personalized guidance throughout the process. Key services include quick pre-approvals through the FairwayNOW app, efficient processing, and a commitment to consistent communication. The company emphasizes a team-oriented culture and core values such as humility, trust, and service. Fairway also engages in philanthropic efforts through Fairway Cares, supporting various causes, including service dogs for veterans and disaster relief initiatives.
